name: AdaniConneX Private Limited
description: Adani x EdgeConneX JV; ~$100bn AI-DC pledge anchored by Google (Visakhapatnam) and Microsoft.

name: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.
description: Only credible accelerator alternative to Nvidia (MI300X/MI350); empanelled under IndiaAI but a hedge, not an escape.

name: Aeronautical Development Agency
description: DRDO design house holding design authority for Tejas and AMCA — the IP node even where private primes build.

name: Amazon Web Services India
description: Largest hyperscaler footprint (Mumbai + Hyderabad); foreign-controlled compute most Indian AI workloads run on.

name: Applied Materials Inc.
description: World's largest wafer-fab-equipment maker; India fabs fully import-dependent on AMAT process tools.

name: ASML Holding NV
description: Global lithography monopoly; supplies DUV tools to Dholera. India's advanced-patterning depends entirely on ASML.

name: Attero Recycling Private Limited
description: Major e-waste/Li-ion recycler; patented hydromet black-mass processing recovering Li/Ni/Co/REE.

name: Bharat Dynamics Limited
description: Sole DPSU missile-integration prime — Akash, Astra, QRSAM, ATGMs; core node for guided-munitions stockpile.

name: Bharat Electronics Limited
description: Dominant defence-electronics prime — radar, EW, fire-control, SAM electronics; load-bearing for nearly every system.

name: Bharat Forge Limited (Kalyani Strategic Systems)
description: Private artillery/forgings prime; lead ATAGS supplier, AMCA consortium lead; controls gun-forging/barrel capacity.

name: Bharti Airtel Limited
description: Owns Nxtra and Mumbai/Chennai cable landings (2Africa Pearls, SEA-ME-WE-6); a subsea-landing chokepoint.

name: BrahMos Aerospace Private Limited
description: India-Russia supersonic cruise-missile JV; India's flagship strike-missile and export node.

name: CAMYEN SE
description: Catamarca state miner; KABIL's counterparty on India's first sovereign overseas lithium asset (5 blocks).

name: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing
description: MeitY R&D body; nodal agency for DLI and the cloud EDA/IP 'ChipIN' gateway for fabless startups.

name: CG Power and Industrial Solutions Limited
description: Murugappa/TII-owned promoter holding ~92.3% of CG Semi; domestic anchor of a Sanand OSAT.

name: CG Semi Private Limited
description: CG Power-led Sanand OSAT JV (CG/Renesas/Stars); ramping to 15M units/day.

name: Chargebee
description: Indian subscription-revenue-management SaaS; ~USD 3.5bn valuation. Chennai-origin.

name: Coal India Limited
description: Maharatna coal monopoly diversifying into critical minerals; pursuing Argentina lithium-brine assets.

name: Cochin Shipyard Limited
description: Builder of the indigenous aircraft carrier Vikrant; the only Indian yard proven on carrier integration.

name: Continental Device India Limited
description: India's oldest semiconductor maker; Mohali expansion for high-power discretes (MOSFETs, IGBTs, SiC).

name: Critical Minerals Facilitation Office (Australia)
description: Australian govt office; KABIL counterparty under the India-Australia Critical Minerals Investment Partnership.

name: Crystal Matrix Limited
description: Approved (2026) for India's first commercial Mini/Micro-LED GaN display + GaN foundry at Dholera.

name: CtrlS Datacenters Limited
description: Largest Indian-owned Rated-4 colocation operator; IndiaAI-empanelled domestic-controlled hyperscale capacity.

name: Darwinbox
description: Indian HR-tech SaaS unicorn; revenue ~Rs 393 cr FY24 (+58%). Domestic alternative to Workday/SAP HCM.

name: Dassault Aviation
description: Rafale OEM; 26 Rafale-Marine signed 2025; France now India's #2 arms supplier.

name: Defence Research and Development Organisation
description: Apex defence-design/IP authority (~50 labs); designs the systems DPSUs build; holds indigenous GaN/SiC breakthrough.

name: Defence Semiconductor / GaN-SiC Capability (chokepoint)
description: The sensor/EW chokepoint — GaN/SiC RF chips for radar/EW/missiles; DRDO cracked indigenous GaN at pilot scale in 2026.

name: Department of Defence Production
description: MoD department administering DPSUs, indigenisation lists and iDEX; owner of the production/export value targets.

name: Design Linked Incentive Scheme
description: Sole structured funding channel for India's fabless/IP layer; 24 projects, 16 tape-outs by 2026.

name: E2E Networks Limited
description: First IndiaAI provider to deploy 100% of committed GPUs; the proof-of-execution node for the GPU pillar.

name: Frappe Technologies (ERPNext)
description: Indian-built open-source ERP (GPLv3) on Frappe/MariaDB; GST & e-invoicing native; adopted by NDDB and state bodies.

name: Freshworks
description: Indian-origin CX/CRM SaaS; NASDAQ-listed, approaching US$1bn revenue.

name: Gallium
description: Critical input for GaN/compound-semi and RF/power devices; China controls ~98-99% with export controls.

name: Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers Limited
description: Frigate/corvette yard; L1 for 5 of 8 Next-Generation Corvettes; surface-combatant pipeline node.

name: GE Aerospace
description: THE jet-engine chokepoint — sole supplier of F404/F414 engines for Tejas; delays have throttled deliveries.

name: Geological Survey of India
description: National exploration agency; 1,200 NCMM exploration projects; the upstream resource-definition chokepoint.

name: Google Cloud India
description: $15bn AP project; Jamnagar region for Reliance + Visakhapatnam campus with Adani; equity in Jio.

name: Graphite (battery-anode grade)
description: Largest anode material by weight in Li-ion cells; China ~90% battery-grade refining with export curbs.

name: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited
description: Sole indigenous fighter/helicopter integrator; Tejas prime; the chokepoint linking airpower to foreign engines.

name: Hindustan Copper Limited
description: Sole domestic copper-ore miner of scale; chronic under-output leaves India dependent on imported concentrate.

name: Hindustan Zinc Limited
description: World's largest integrated zinc/silver producer; pivoting to multi-metal critical-mineral recovery.

name: Hon Hai Technology Group
description: World's largest contract manufacturer; JV partner in India Chip OSAT and broad India electronics build-out.

name: India Chip (HCL-Foxconn JV)
description: HCL-Foxconn display-driver OSAT at Jewar/YEIDA (UP), ~Rs 3,706 cr; extends OSAT beyond Gujarat.

name: India Electronics and Semiconductor Association
description: Apex ESDM industry body; convenes industry-government policy and SEMICON India inputs.

name: India Semiconductor Mission
description: Independent business division under MeitY; single approval/disbursement gate for every fab and OSAT.

name: India-Asia-Xpress / India-Europe-Xpress cable systems
description: Reliance/Jio-led subsea systems landing at Mumbai/Chennai; the international-bandwidth chokepoint for Indian inferencing.

name: IndiaAI Mission
description: Rs 10,372 cr scheme; Compute pillar subsidises a pooled GPU cluster (>38,000 GPUs) — the compute demand-aggregation chokepoint.

name: Infosys
description: IT-services major; builder of Finacle core-banking product — proof that where India built the product, sovereignty followed.

name: Innovations for Defence Excellence
description: DDP startup/MSME procurement on-ramp; ADITI funds deep-tech incl. defence semiconductors and autonomy.

name: IREL (India) Limited
description: Sole domestic rare-earth miner/processor; monazite-to-NdPr and sole REE-magnet producer; single REE feedstock point.

name: Jio Platforms Limited
description: Reliance digital/telecom arm and IndiaAI-empanelled GPU provider; Google and Meta hold equity.

name: Kaynes Semicon Private Limited
description: Operates India's second operational OSAT (Sanand, Mar 2026); shipped first commercial multi-chip module.

name: Khanij Bidesh India Limited
description: NALCO/HCL/MECL JV; sole vehicle for sovereign offshore mineral acquisition (Argentina lithium, Australia partnership).

name: Krutrim
description: Ola-backed Indian AI/cloud platform building indigenous models and AI cloud infrastructure.

name: Krutrim SI Designs Private Limited
description: Ola-backed indigenous-model/cloud player; the non-state sovereign-model alternative to Sarvam.

name: Lam Research Corporation
description: Dominant etch/deposition equipment supplier; India ~100% import-dependent for etch tooling.

name: Larsen & Toubro Limited (Precision Engineering & Systems)
description: Largest private defence-engineering prime; K9 Vajra producer, AMCA consortium lead with BEL.

name: Lithium
description: Core battery metal; India ~100% import-dependent, refining China-routed; the defining import-dependency mineral.

name: Lohum Cleantech Private Limited
description: India's largest integrated Li-ion recycler; announced India's first battery-grade lithium refinery.

name: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Limited
description: Premier submarine/destroyer yard; lead yard for the ~Rs 70,000 cr Project-75I submarine programme with TKMS.

name: Micron ATMP Sanand
description: First facility operational under ISM (Feb 2026); ~Rs 22,500 cr; first Made-in-India memory modules.

name: Micron Semiconductor Technology India Private Limited
description: Operates India's first operational chip unit (Sanand ATMP); DRAM/NAND assembly-test.

name: Microsoft Azure India
description: $17.5bn India commitment; anchor AdaniConneX tenant; primary foreign GPU-cloud for enterprise/government AI.

name: Microsoft Corporation
description: Productivity (M365), desktop OS (Windows), cloud (Azure) and ERP (Dynamics). Multi-layer dependency.

name: Mineral Exploration and Consultancy Limited
description: Miniratna drilling/exploration CPSE; converts GSI prospects into auctionable resources; co-owns KABIL.

name: Ministry of Defence (Government of India)
description: Apex authority owning the budget, DAC and DAP-2020 rules; sets indigenisation mandates routing value to domestic primes.

name: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
description: Parent ministry owning Semicon India, ISM, SPECS, DLI, SCL and IndiaAI Mission; the policy/budget chokepoint.

name: Ministry of Heavy Industries
description: Administers the rare-earth-magnet (REPM) and auto/ACC-battery PLI schemes; downstream-localisation policy owner.

name: Ministry of Mines
description: Apex mineral policymaker; amended MMDR Act 2023, owns KABIL, runs NCMM; the regulatory chokepoint.

name: Mishra Dhatu Nigam Limited
description: Sole Indian producer of titanium alloys and maraging steels; the materials chokepoint upstream of missiles, subs, engines.

name: MOSIP
description: Modular Open Source Identity Platform (IIIT Bangalore, 2018; Aadhaar model). Deployed in Philippines, Ethiopia, Morocco + advanced/pilot in 9+ countries; 100M+ IDs by 2023. India EXPORTS sovereign-identity software.

name: Munitions India Limited
description: Largest OFB-successor DPSU; core ammunition/explosives supplier — the war-stock/consumables base.

name: National Aluminium Company Limited
description: Integrated aluminium PSU; developing India's first gallium extraction (Damanjodi) and red-mud REE recovery; co-owns KABIL.

name: National Critical Mineral Mission
description: Rs 34,300 cr 7-year whole-of-value-chain mission: exploration, foreign assets, processing, recycling, stockpiling.

name: NTT Global Data Centers (India)
description: Largest colocation operator in India by share; ~500 MW Mumbai; IndiaAI second-tender qualified.

name: NVIDIA Corporation
description: THE chokepoint — ~80% of AI-GPU supply; every major Indian DC and the IndiaAI cluster run on Nvidia silicon.

name: Nxtra Data Limited
description: Bharti Airtel's DC subsidiary; couples compute capacity to Airtel's subsea backbone.

name: Oracle Corporation
description: ERP, database (market-leading) and cloud. Core foreign control of the database layer; owns FLEXCUBE core-banking (India-built).

name: People's Republic of China
description: Controls ~90% REE processing, ~98% gallium/germanium, ~90% battery-graphite refining; the binding chokepoint.

name: Perfios
description: Indian fintech SaaS (2024 unicorn); revenue ~Rs 558 cr FY24 (+37%).

name: Postman
description: Indian-founded API-development platform (global standard); now HQ overseas — emblem of the export-not-displace pattern.

name: Powerchip Semiconductor Manufacturing Corporation
description: Taiwanese foundry licensing the Dholera process technology; India's logic-fab process IP depends on PSMC.

name: Ramco Systems
description: Indian ERP vendor; among the few domestic players in the foreign-dominated ERP top tier.

name: Rare Earth Elements / Neodymium-Praseodymium
description: NdPr drives EV/wind/defence magnets; India ~100% China-dependent for finished NdFeB (imported 53,748 t FY25).

name: Reasi Lithium Deposit (Salal-Haimana, J&K)
description: India's headline 5.9 Mt lithium find; auction failed twice, returned to GSI — bellwether of non-bankable domestic supply.

name: Reliance Industries Limited
description: Largest single Indian AI-infra bet (~$110bn); GW-scale Jamnagar AI DC on Nvidia Blackwell with captive green power.

name: Renesas Electronics Corporation
description: Japanese IDM supplying packaging tech and anchor demand to CG Semi.

name: Russian Federation (Rosoboronexport / Almaz-Antey)
description: Largest source of India's legacy fleet and spares; S-400 and BrahMos JV partner.

name: Salesforce
description: CRM market leader; primary foreign competitor to Zoho/Freshworks in India.

name: SAP SE
description: Global ERP incumbent. >5,000 Indian enterprises run SAP; SAP India Pvt Ltd revenue ~Rs 8,870 cr FY25. Deepest-captured layer of India enterprise stack.

name: Sarvam AI
description: State-anointed sovereign-LLM builder; subsidised 4,096 H100s at Yotta; the services/IP node for model sovereignty.

name: Scheme for Promotion of Manufacturing of Electronic Components and Semiconductors
description: Capital-subsidy scheme for components/specialty materials; load-bearing for upstream localisation.

name: Scheme to Promote Manufacturing of Sintered Rare Earth Permanent Magnets
description: Rs 7,280 cr scheme (Nov 2025) to build 6,000 MTPA NdFeB magnet capacity; India's instrument to close the magnet import gap.

name: Semi-Conductor Laboratory
description: India's only operational government IDM fab (180nm); strategic chokepoint for ISRO/DRDO/defence-grade chips.

name: Semicon India Programme
description: Rs 76,000 cr umbrella scheme; up to 50% fiscal support that makes each approved unit viable.

name: ServiceNow
description: Enterprise workflow / ITSM platform; rising agentic-AI footprint.

name: SiCSem Private Limited
description: India's first commercial Silicon Carbide compound-semi fab (Bhubaneswar, with UK Clas-SiC); SiC power-device chokepoint.

name: Solar Industries India Limited
description: Largest private explosives/ammunition and loitering-munition maker (Nagastra, Pinaka rockets).

name: Specialty Semiconductor Gases and Photoresist
description: Photoresist, specialty gases, high-purity chemicals, wafers; >90% imported — the materials-layer chokepoint.

name: ST Telemedia Global Data Centres (India)
description: ~19% colocation share; $3.2bn / 550 MW India expansion; Singapore-state-linked top-three hosting capacity.

name: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company
description: ~70% global foundry share, >90% leading-edge; fabs all advanced AI silicon and India's DLI startup designs.

name: Tally Solutions
description: Dominant Indian SME accounting software; domestic anchor at the low end.

name: Tata Advanced Systems Limited
description: Leading private aerospace/defence prime; shortlisted for AMCA prototype, ATAGS co-producer, C-295 assembly.

name: Tata Communications Limited
description: IndiaAI-empanelled compute provider and major subsea/network operator within the Tata ecosystem.

name: Tata Consultancy Services
description: Largest Indian IT-services firm; BaNCS core-banking/financial products. Embodies the services-not-products path dependency.

name: Tata Electronics Private Limited
description: India's anchor fab/OSAT champion; operates the only approved domestic logic megafab and the Assam OSAT.

name: Tata Semiconductor Assembly and Test
description: India's largest indigenous OSAT (Jagiroad, Assam, ~Rs 27,000 cr); Phase 1 commissioning 2026.

name: Tata Semiconductor Fab, Dholera
description: India's first 300mm commercial logic fab (28-110nm, 50k WSPM, ~Rs 91,000 cr); the national fab chokepoint.

name: ThyssenKrupp Marine Systems
description: Design authority/technology partner for Project-75I submarines; supplies AIP and critical submarine tech.

name: Tokyo Electron Limited
description: ~90% share of photoresist coat/develop track systems; coat/develop chokepoint for every India fab.

name: Toyotsu Rare Earths India Private Limited
description: Toyota Tsusho subsidiary processing IREL rare earths; its 2025 export-pact suspension marks India's conservation pivot.

name: Vedanta Limited
description: Major private copper smelter/refiner (Tuticorin shut since 2018); REPM magnet bidder.

name: Wipro
description: IT-services major; early failed product attempt (Instaplan) illustrates the structural product gap.

name: Workday
description: Cloud HCM and finance; enterprise back-office dependency.

name: Yotta Data Services Private Limited
description: Most load-bearing IndiaAI GPU node — largest tender allocation and host of Sarvam's sovereign-model cluster.

name: Zoho Corporation
description: Bootstrapped Indian SaaS suite; revenue >Rs 12,000 cr FY25, profitable. Leading candidate for a sovereign enterprise-software suite.
